versions.version_description: 80's pop-rock feel. Please follow the record to understand the pace of these changes as there are many passing chords which support the melody and harmonies. Each chorus builds in length, intensity, and complexity as they go by. Outro fades out over the spoken final line.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Voices Carry by Til Tuesday
Standard Tuning
Timing switches from 6/4 to 4/4 and back and forth.  Just listen to Aimee and you'll get it right.

[Intro]
[tab][ch]G[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] | [ch]G[/ch]
[play twice, hold G into first verse][/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
In the dark, I like to read his mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
But I'm frightened of the things I might find[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
Oh, there must be something he's thinking of[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
To tear him away[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
When I tell him that I'm falling in love[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Why does he say[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Hush hush keep it down now voices carry[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Hush hush keep it down now voices carry[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Uh-uh[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
I try so hard not to get upset[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Because I know all the trouble I'll get[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
Oh, he tells me tears are something to hide[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
And something to fear[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
And I try so hard to keep it inside[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
So no one can hear[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Hush hush keep it down now voices carry[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Hush hush keep it down now voices carry[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Uh-uh[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
He wants me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
But only part of the time[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
He wants me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
If he can keep me in line[/tab]

[REPEAT CHORUS UNTIL END]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Hush hush, keep it down now, voices carry[/tab]
Hush hush, keep it down now, voices carry
Hush hush, shut up now, voices carry
Hush hush, keep it down now, voices carry
Oh hush hush, darling, she might overhear
Hush, hush - voices carry
He said shut up - he said shut up
Oh God can't you keep it down
Voices carry
Hush hush, voices carry
I wish he would let me talk
